should_trigger.text: Ignore the noisy meeting chatter and operationalize this support escalation workflow into a maintained skill package with trigger hardening.
Codify this routine into a reusable capability from docs, transcripts, and prompt history, then stress test the route boundary.

should_not_trigger.text: Create a wiki package from this runbook and do not generate any skill files.
Summarize this SOP, translate it into Japanese for the knowledge base, and keep it as documentation only.

near_neighbor.text: Outline a possible future skill from these notes, but stop short of making a full skill and keep it as a plain note.
Brainstorm packaging improvements for later and keep this as discussion only.
